name: renown-vscode
description: Earn renown for real dev work — a live status bar + activity-driven sync, right in your editor. Talks to your renown server.

renown.endpoint.markdownDescription: Your renown server's API base URL. **Once renown is hosted this defaults to the hosted URL and won't need setting** — only set it to override (self-hosted / local dev), e.g. `http://localhost:7777/api` against a locally-run `bun run start` in `renown/web`.

renown.login.markdownDescription: Optional override for your renown identity. Normally you **Sign in with GitHub** (`Renown: Sign in with GitHub`) and this stays blank — the signed-in identity is used and shown as verified. Set this only to view as a specific login (self-hosted / testing); an override that differs from your signed-in account takes precedence.

renown.heartbeatMinutes.description: Minutes of active editing in a repo before its renown is refreshed (a debounced server-side recompute from GitHub).

renown.statusRefreshSeconds.description: How often the status bar re-fetches your renown from the server.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: bun run typecheck && bun run build
